services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Professional plumbing solutions for every need

reparacion-de-fugas.title: Leak Repair
reparacion-de-fugas.shortDesc: We detect and repair water leaks in pipes, taps and plumbing systems using advanced technology with minimal disruption.
reparacion-de-fugas.description:
Water leaks are one of the most common and potentially damaging problems any home or commercial property can suffer. An undetected leak can cause serious structural damage, damp and mould, and a considerable increase in your water bill. At Fontaneria Martos we have over 15 years of experience detecting and repairing all types of leaks in Sant Vicent del Raspeig and surrounding areas.

We use state-of-the-art detection equipment, including thermal imaging cameras, acoustic correlation equipment and tracer gas, allowing us to precisely locate the exact point of the leak without unnecessary work.

Our team is prepared to deal with leaks in embedded pipes, downpipes, main connections, heating circuits, irrigation systems and drainage networks. We work in private homes, residential communities, commercial premises and industrial units.
benefits: Precise detection with thermal cameras and acoustic equipment
Repair with minimal disruption thanks to non-invasive techniques
24-hour emergency service with response in under 45 minutes
Fixed quote with no surprises or additional costs
2-year guarantee on all repairs carried out

process.title: Inspection and diagnosis
process.desc: We carry out a complete inspection of the plumbing system using advanced detection equipment to locate the exact source of the leak.

process.title: Detailed quote
process.desc: We present you with a fixed quote with all available repair options.

process.title: Professional repair
process.desc: We carry out the repair using the most appropriate techniques, prioritising less invasive solutions.

process.title: Verification and guarantee
process.desc: We verify the repair is watertight through pressure tests and provide a written guarantee certificate.

faq.q: How do I know if I have a hidden leak?
faq.a: The most common signs are damp patches on walls or ceilings, an unexplained increase in your water bill, the sound of running water when all taps are closed, or your water meter running without apparent consumption.

faq.q: Do you need to break the wall to repair an embedded leak?
faq.a: Not always. We have non-invasive repair techniques such as pipe relining and specialised welding.

faq.q: How much does it cost to repair a water leak?
faq.a: The cost depends on the type of leak, its location and complexity. A simple repair can start from 60 euros, while an embedded leak can range between 150 and 500 euros.

faq.q: Do you attend water leaks at weekends?
faq.a: Yes, we offer a 24-hour emergency service, 7 days a week, including weekends and bank holidays.

instalacion-de-fontaneria.title: Plumbing Installation
instalacion-de-fontaneria.shortDesc: We carry out complete plumbing installations for new builds and renovations, using approved materials and complying with all current regulations.
instalacion-de-fontaneria.description:
Plumbing installation is the foundation of any building and requires professional design and execution to guarantee optimal performance for decades. At Fontaneria Martos we specialise in complete installations for new-build homes, full renovations, commercial premises and residential communities.

Our service covers everything from pipe layout design to final installation of sanitary ware and taps, including the main connection, hot and cold water distribution, drainage and connection to the sewage network.

We exclusively use first-quality approved materials: polypropylene, multilayer, copper and PVC pipes. All our installations comply with the Technical Building Code.
benefits: Compliance with the Technical Building Code
Coordination with other trades for full renovations

process.title: Technical visit and design
process.desc: We evaluate the space, take measurements and design the optimal pipe layout.

process.title: Detailed quote
process.desc: Complete breakdown of materials, labour and execution timelines.

process.title: Installation execution
process.desc: We install the entire plumbing network with first-quality materials.

process.title: Testing and certification
process.desc: We carry out pressure and watertightness tests, and issue the corresponding certificate.

faq.q: What materials do you use for pipes?
faq.a: We work with polypropylene (PPR), multilayer and copper for water, and PVC for drainage. We select the most suitable material for each installation.

faq.q: Do you handle the necessary permits?
faq.a: Yes, we process all necessary permits and certificates, including the plumbing certificate for supply connection.

faq.q: How long does a complete installation take?
faq.a: It depends on the project size. A standard home can be ready in 3-5 working days.

desatascos.title: Drain Unblocking and Pipe Cleaning
desatascos.shortDesc: Professional drain unblocking service with high-pressure equipment. We solve blockages in pipes, downpipes and drainage networks.
desatascos.description:
Blocked pipes are one of the most annoying and frequent incidents in any home or business. A blockage can cause bad odours, overflows and even water damage if not resolved in time. At Fontaneria Martos we have professional unblocking equipment to resolve any type of obstruction quickly and definitively.

We have mechanical and high-pressure unblocking machinery (up to 300 bar) capable of eliminating the most resistant obstructions. We also use CCTV inspection cameras to precisely diagnose the cause and location of the blockage.

We unblock kitchen sinks, washbasins, showers, bathtubs, toilets, communal downpipes and general drainage networks.
benefits: CCTV inspection camera for precise diagnosis
Preventive cleaning to avoid future blockages

process.title: Camera diagnosis
process.desc: We inspect the pipe with CCTV camera to identify the exact cause of the blockage.

process.title: Professional unblocking
process.desc: We apply the most suitable technique according to the type of obstruction.

process.title: Complete cleaning
process.desc: We clean the entire pipe to prevent future blockages.

process.title: Final verification
process.desc: We check with camera that the pipe is completely clear.

faq.a: Yes, we have a 24-hour emergency service for serious blockages that could cause overflows or water damage.
Yes, we have the experience and appropriate equipment to unblock communal downpipes and drainage networks.
We recommend not pouring fats or solid waste down the drain, using protective grilles and carrying out annual preventive cleaning.

calentadores-y-calderas.title: Water Heaters and Boilers
calentadores-y-calderas.shortDesc: Installation, repair and maintenance of water heaters and gas boilers from all brands.
calentadores-y-calderas.description:
The correct functioning of your water heater or boiler is essential for your daily comfort. At Fontaneria Martos we offer a complete service covering the installation of new equipment, fault repair and preventive maintenance to guarantee maximum efficiency and safety.

We work with all market brands: Junkers, Vaillant, Baxi, Saunier Duval, Ferroli and more. Our technicians are certified to work with gas installations and receive continuous training on the latest technologies.

We offer annual maintenance contracts that include complete inspection, circuit cleaning and parameter adjustment to optimise energy consumption.
benefits: Service for all brands and models

process.title: Equipment diagnosis
process.desc: We review the complete state of the heater or boiler to identify the problem.

process.title: Repair quote
process.desc: We inform you of the cost and advise whether it's worth repairing or replacing.

process.title: Repair or installation
process.desc: We carry out the work with original parts following manufacturer specifications.

process.title: Start-up and adjustment
process.desc: We verify correct operation and adjust parameters for maximum efficiency.

faq.q: How often should the boiler be serviced?
faq.a: An annual service is recommended to ensure safety and energy efficiency. It is also required by regulations.

faq.q: When should I replace my water heater?
faq.a: If it's over 10-15 years old, has frequent breakdowns or consumption has increased notably, it's advisable to replace it with a more efficient model.

faq.q: Do you work with electric water heaters?
faq.a: Yes, we install and repair both gas and electric heaters, as well as storage tanks and heat pumps.

reformas-de-banos.title: Bathroom and Kitchen Renovations
reformas-de-banos.shortDesc: Complete bathroom and kitchen renovations with personalised design, full plumbing and first-quality finishes.
reformas-de-banos.description:
We transform your bathroom or kitchen with complete renovations covering everything from initial design to final finishes. At Fontaneria Martos we handle all the plumbing and coordinate other trades to offer you a turnkey service.

Our renovations include: removal of old installation, new plumbing network, waterproofing, installation of sanitary ware, taps, shower tray or bathtub, bathroom furniture, tiling and flooring. All with selected materials and first-quality finishes.

We help you choose materials and advise on the best options according to your budget and taste. We work with the best brands: Roca, Grohe, Hansgrohe, Geberit and more.
benefits: Turnkey service: design, plumbing and finishes
Bathtub to accessible shower tray conversion

process.title: Visit and personalised design
process.desc: We take measurements, listen to your preferences and propose a design adapted to your space and budget.

process.title: Fixed quote
process.desc: Detailed breakdown of all works, materials and timelines. No surprises.

process.title: Renovation execution
process.desc: We carry out all plumbing, tiling, flooring and finishing work with daily cleaning.

process.title: Handover and guarantee
process.desc: We review every detail together and provide written guarantee for all works.

faq.q: How long does a complete bathroom renovation take?
faq.a: A complete renovation usually takes between 5 and 10 working days. Partial renovations can be done in 2-3 days.

faq.q: Can I use the bathroom during the renovation?
faq.a: We try to minimise disruption. If you only have one bathroom, we organise the work so you can use it at the end of each day.

faq.q: Do you also handle tiling and flooring?
faq.a: Yes, we offer a comprehensive service that includes tiling, flooring, painting and all necessary finishes.
Yes, we carry out complete kitchen renovations including all plumbing, drainage and appliance connections.

about.pageSubtitle: More than two decades of experience back our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.
about.historyP1: Fontaneria Martos was founded in 2003 in Sant Vicent del Raspeig, when Antonio Martos decided to start his own plumbing company after over a decade working in the sector. His goal was clear: to offer a professional, honest and approachable plumbing service to his neighbours.
about.historyP2: What began as a small family business has grown to become one of the leading plumbing companies in the l'Alacanti region. Today, our team of qualified professionals serves thousands of customers each year, from private homes to residential communities and businesses.
about.historyP3: Throughout these 20+ years, we have maintained the values that define us: quality workmanship, fair and transparent pricing, and personal attention to every customer. We are proud that most of our new customers come recommended by other satisfied clients.
about.missionText: To be the leading plumbing company in Alicante, offering professional, fast and lasting solutions that exceed our customers' expectations.
